final:
module top_module(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input [3:0] init_value,
  output reg [3:0] count
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
      count <= init_value;
    end else begin
      count <= count + 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
